items.badge_description: At a new place and don't want to choose a pint of something you may not like? Grab a few tasters! Enjoy some small pours and then decide which to upgrade to a full pour. That's 120 checkins with the serving style of Taster. Try 5 more for Level 25! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

items.checkin_comment: Not bad for the WC style; pretty clean slight bitterness with sweeter peachy hop tones.
